# Data Inventory

**Last Updated**: 2026-05-14T15:13:06Z (auto-generated)

Generated by `python -m yen_gov coverage`. Do not hand-edit. Re-run after every ingest. Indicator coverage is derived from [datasets/indicators/in/](../../datasets/indicators/in/); the declared election catalogue lives at [datasets/reference/in/election-events.json](../../datasets/reference/in/election-events.json); on-disk election artifacts live under [datasets/elections/](../../datasets/elections/). The Temporal Richness meter (‚óè filled / ‚óã empty) is explained in [docs/architecture/backend/coverage.md](../architecture/backend/coverage.md).

## Summary

- 34 (state, event) slices on disk across 22 states / 21 cohorts.
- 4,422 per-AC result artifacts emitted in total.
- 9 state(s) / UT(s) with a legislative assembly are not yet in the catalogue at all (see "Missing" below).

## Missing (no entry in the events catalogue)

These states/UTs have a legislative assembly but no `event_id` registered in [election-events.json](../../datasets/reference/in/election-events.json). Adding one means: (a) appending a `(state, year) -> EventInfo` row to [backend/yen_gov/sources/eci/events.py](../../backend/yen_gov/sources/eci/events.py), (b) writing the cohort metadata at `datasets/events/in/eci/<event_id>/election.json`, then (c) `python -m yen_gov eci-statreport-emit <state> <year>`. UTs without an assembly (Andaman, Chandigarh, Dadra & NH, Lakshadweep, Ladakh) are intentionally excluded ‚Äî they elect Lok Sabha MPs only.

| State / UT | Code | Kind |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Gujarat | `S06` | state |
| Manipur | `S14` | state |
| Meghalaya | `S15` | state |
| Nagaland | `S17` | state |
| Punjab | `S19` | state |
| Rajasthan | `S20` | state |
| Tripura | `S23` | state |
| Uttar Pradesh | `S24` | state |
| Uttarakhand | `S28` | state |

## 1. Indicators

56 artifact(s) under `datasets/indicators/in/`. The Temporal Richness meter projects each indicator's `coverage.temporal` span onto 7 cells of 3 fiscal years (buckets: FY06‚ÄìFY08, FY09‚ÄìFY11, FY12‚ÄìFY14, FY15‚ÄìFY17, FY18‚ÄìFY20, FY21‚ÄìFY23, FY24‚ÄìFY26). Snapshots fill exactly one cell and carry a `(snapshot)` tag.

## 2a. Elections ‚Äî coverage depth (state-first)

22 state(s)/UT(s) have at least one on-disk slice. The Temporal Richness meter here is **event-cycle-based**: each cell is one election cycle (rightmost = newest), so a state with 3 ingested elections shows `‚óã ‚óã ‚óã ‚óã ‚óè ‚óè ‚óè 3/7`.
